Entries.Text: Enable Auto-Load on Smithbox Start
If enabled, a previously loaded project will be loaded automatically upon starting Smithbox.
Enable Automatic Auto-Load Assignment
If enabled, loading a project will automatically flag it to 'auto-load'.
Default Project Directory
The default directory to use during the project directory selection when creating a new project.
Default Data Directory
The default directory to use during the data directory selection when creating a new project.
Enable Backup Saves
If enabled, backup files are created during save events (i.e. .bak and .prev files).
Enable Project Directory Addition Detection

If enabled, new files that only reside in the project directory will be detected. Required if you are working with custom files and wnat them to appear in Smithbox.
If disabled, project startup is quicker.
Enable Strict Project Directory Scan
If enabled, the additional validation will be performed before adding a file to the project's file list.
Enable Automatic Save
If enabled, all enabled editors will automatically save.
Automatic Save Interval
The rate at which the automatic save occurs. In seconds.
Include Map Editor
If enabled, the Map Editor is automatically saved.
Include Param Editor
If enabled, the Param Editor is automatically saved.
Include Text Editor
If enabled, the Text Editor is automatically saved.
Include Graphics Param Editor
If enabled, the Graphics Param Editor is automatically saved.
Include Material Editor
If enabled, the Material Editor is automatically saved.
ME3 Profile Directory
Select the directory you want the generated ME3 profiles to be placed in.
Utilise PTDE Collisions in Dark Souls: Remastered Projects
If enabled, and a Dark Souls: Prepare to Die Edition install exists, the collision files from it will be used for collisions and navmeshes.
PTDE Install Path
The install directory for Dark Souls: Prepare to Die Edition.
